'''鈭歨-d-s''' ('''hadasa''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:starfuck|starfuck]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-d-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:starfuck|starfuck]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歨-d-s
|-
! Lemma
| hadasa
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:hadasithi|hadasithi]] || [[word:hadasiji|hadasiji]] || [[word:hadasishi|hadasishi]] || [[word:hadasi|hadasi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:hadasuthuth|hadasuthuth]] || [[word:hadasujuj|hadasujuj]] || [[word:hadasushush|hadasushush]] || [[word:hadas|hadas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:hadasuthu|hadasuthu]] || [[word:hadasuju|hadasuju]] || [[word:hadasushu|hadasushu]] || [[word:hadasu|hadasu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:hadasufuth|hadasufuth]] || [[word:hadasufuj|hadasufuj]] || [[word:hadasufush|hadasufush]] || [[word:hadasuf|hadasuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:hadasethe|hadasethe]] || [[word:hadaseje|hadaseje]] || [[word:hadaseshe|hadaseshe]] || [[word:hadase|hadase]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:hadasothoth|hadasothoth]] || [[word:hadasojoj|hadasojoj]] || [[word:hadasoshosh|hadasoshosh]] || [[word:hadas|hadas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:hadasotho|hadasotho]] || [[word:hadasojo|hadasojo]] || [[word:hadasosho|hadasosho]] || [[word:hadaso|hadaso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:hadasofoth|hadasofoth]] || [[word:hadasofoj|hadasofoj]] || [[word:hadasofosh|hadasofosh]] || [[word:hadasof|hadasof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:hadas忙th忙|hadas忙th忙]] || [[word:hadas忙j忙|hadas忙j忙]] || [[word:hadas忙sh忙|hadas忙sh忙]] || [[word:hadas忙|hadas忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:hadasathath|hadasathath]] || [[word:hadasajaj|hadasajaj]] || [[word:hadasashash|hadasashash]] || [[word:hadas|hadas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:hadasatha|hadasatha]] || [[word:hadasaja|hadasaja]] || [[word:hadasasha|hadasasha]] || [[word:hadasa|hadasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:hadasafath|hadasafath]] || [[word:hadasafaj|hadasafaj]] || [[word:hadasafash|hadasafash]] || [[word:hadasaf|hadasaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:hadasasha|hadasasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gohadasasha|gohadasasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokihadasasha|gokihadasasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:hadasn眉sha|hadasn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gohadasnkn眉sha|gohadasnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokihadasn眉sha|gokihadasn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:hadash毛sha|hadash毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohadasnksh毛sha|gohadasnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokihadash毛sha|gokihadash毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:hadasrosha|hadasrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohadasnkrosha|gohadasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokihadasrosha|gokihadasrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:hadasmusha|hadasmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gohadasnkmusha|gohadasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihadasmusha|gokihadasmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:hadasherasha|hadasherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gohadasnksherasha|gohadasnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokihadasherasha|gokihadasherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:hadasngasha|hadasngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gohadasnkngasha|gohadasnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokihadasngasha|gokihadasngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:hadasyasha|hadasyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gohadasnkyasha|gohadasnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokihadasyasha|gokihadasyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:hadasyamasha|hadasyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gohadasnkyamasha|gohadasnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokihadasyamasha|gokihadasyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:hadasn眉sh毛sha|hadasn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gohadasnkn眉sh毛sha|gohadasnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokihadasn眉sh毛sha|gokihadasn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:hadasn眉rosha|hadasn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohadasnkn眉rosha|gohadasnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokihadasn眉rosha|gokihadasn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hadasn眉musha|hadasn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohadasnkn眉musha|gohadasnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihadasn眉musha|gokihadasn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:hadash毛n眉sha|hadash毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gohadasnksh毛n眉sha|gohadasnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokihadash毛n眉sha|gokihadash毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:hadash毛rosha|hadash毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohadasnksh毛rosha|gohadasnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokihadash毛rosha|gokihadash毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hadash毛musha|hadash毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohadasnksh毛musha|gohadasnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihadash毛musha|gokihadash毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:hadasron眉sha|hadasron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gohadasnkron眉sha|gohadasnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokihadasron眉sha|gokihadasron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:hadasrosh毛sha|hadasrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gohadasnkrosh毛sha|gohadasnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokihadasrosh毛sha|gokihadasrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hadasromusha|hadasromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohadasnkromusha|gohadasnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihadasromusha|gokihadasromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:hadasmun眉sha|hadasmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gohadasnkmun眉sha|gohadasnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokihadasmun眉sha|gokihadasmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:hadasmush毛sha|hadasmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gohadasnkmush毛sha|gohadasnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokihadasmush毛sha|gokihadasmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:hadasmurosha|hadasmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohadasnkmurosha|gohadasnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokihadasmurosha|gokihadasmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:hadas|hadas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:h忙d忙s|h忙d忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hohadas|hohadas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hoh忙d忙s|hoh忙d忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohohadas|hohohadas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoh忙d忙s|hohoh忙d忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉hadas|n眉hadas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉h忙d忙s|n眉h忙d忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉hadas|n眉n眉hadas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉h忙d忙s|n眉n眉h忙d忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂hadas|n茂hadas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂h忙d忙s|n茂h忙d忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂hadas|n茂n茂hadas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂h忙d忙s|n茂n茂h忙d忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luhadas|luhadas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luh忙d忙s|luh忙d忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluhadas|luluhadas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluh忙d忙s|luluh忙d忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lihadas|lihadas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lih忙d忙s|lih忙d忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilihadas|lilihadas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilih忙d忙s|lilih忙d忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kohadas|kohadas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:koh忙d忙s|koh忙d忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokohadas|kokohadas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoh忙d忙s|kokoh忙d忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kehadas|kehadas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:keh忙d忙s|keh忙d忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekehadas|kekehadas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeh忙d忙s|kekeh忙d忙s]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d0c3b9f}}
